chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-1583 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case 1. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 23.09.2025 None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Asad Ahmed, Advocate for the Respondent/KMC. Mr. K.A Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A statement has been submitted on behalf of the KMC enclosing a report prepared by the Director (Welfare) Finance & Accounts reflecting that an amount of Rs.1,218,708/- has been paid to the Petitioner by way of Commutation of his Pension and that the monthly Pension is otherwise being paid on a regular basis. Under the circumstances, it appears that the grievance of the Petitioner has been redressed. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
